title: Under the Wave off Kanagawa (Kanagawa oki nami ura) / The Great Wave
license_note: Met Open Access CC0. Confirmed isPublicDomain=true via Met API.
notes: Hokusai Great Wave from 36 Views of Mount Fuji. ~8 blocks, 6 colors per Met conservation literature. Iconic ukiyo-e baseline; small color palette but complex prussian-blue gradients.
